---
title: "test_1772470743.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/gauntlet/test_1772470743.py"
loc: 54
complexity: 2
logic_score: 4.20
style_score: 3.44
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 7.08
---

## Intent
Core semantic routing engine for intent resolution.

## Interaction Protocol
Instantiate SovereignEngine and invoke run(query) to process natural language directives.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [inspect](file://inspect)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [json](file://json)

### Exports
- `test_module_has_docstring`
- `test_execution_tracker_members_have_docstrings`
- `test_project_metrics_engine_members_have_docstrings`
- `ExecutionTracker`
- `__init__`
- `__enter__`
- `__exit__`
- `latency_ms`
- `mem_delta_mb`
- `report`
- `ProjectMetricsEngine`
- `__init__`
